questions.prompt: In AR-style jaw preparation labs, aligning a digital overlay with the patient view primarily trains:

options.text: Spatial orientation of cystic zones relative to tooth-bearing regions

questions.prompt: Before using AR overlays for teaching, the learner should first confirm:

options.text: Camera permission and stable lighting for landmark alignment
That vitality testing is never required

questions.prompt: A pericoronal AR highlight around an impacted crown is most consistent with reviewing:

options.text: Radicular cyst from a non-vital anterior incisor only
Benign fibrous hyperplasia unrelated to tooth germs

questions.prompt: AR preparation in this prototype is best described as:

options.text: A low-stakes spatial drill that complements reading and imaging labs
A regulated diagnostic device cleared for treatment planning
A replacement for faculty-generated MCQ banks
A substitute for microscopic slide review in every case
